system_prompt:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

messages.content: {"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "31ffb15c-3a9d-47a5-b351-d8daebb68453", "article_id": "f7d91373-458c-4fbe-a422-66ae943a31da", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "promotion_sale", "brand": "Levi's", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Levi's sneaky-good spring sale includes up to 70 percent off celebrity-loved jeans", "the brand is quietly slashing prices up to 30 percent off sitewide"], "anchor_json": {"extractor_version": "1.0", "event_category": "commercial_promotion", "brand": "Levi's"}}, {"event_frame_id": "bb4917bb-c916-470d-8a57-5e58007d3519", "article_id": "f7d91373-458c-4fbe-a422-66ae943a31da", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "product_feature", "brand": "Levi's", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["celebrity-loved staples like the Ribcage jeans and Wedgie fit—reminiscent of Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy's signature Levi's", "range of crisp, directional denim dresses (including a sheath style CBK would likely favor) and skirts"], "anchor_json": {"extractor_version": "1.0", "event_category": "editorial_content", "brand": "Levi's"}}]}
